outcome: Exclusive breastfeeding at hospital discharge to 1 month post birth - Marin 2010 sensitivity analysis
source_quote: No Marin 2010 sensitivity analysis found in the paper. The paper is a primary RCT by Perez-Jimenez et al. and does not reference or perform any sensitivity analysis related to Marin 2010.

In the diltiazem group, two patients (aged 73 and 61 years) eventually died 39 and 54 weeks, respectively, after recruitment... Two patients taking placebo (aged 44 and 53 years) died 45 and 101 weeks, respectively, post recruitment

Graft loss not explicitly reported as an outcome in the analyzed population of 110 patients. One patient (placebo) had graft kidney removed at week 2 but was excluded from the main analysis. Four rejection episodes occurred in each group during first 6 months.
